characterImporter.ammoLinkError: Could not link ammunition for "{name}". Ammo can be assigned manually.
characterImporter.hint: Upload a single Chummer character XML export to create a new character actor.
characterImporter.modLinkError: Could not link weapon mods for "{name}". Mods can be assigned manually.
characterImporter.title: Character Importer
characterImporter.updateHint: Upload a Chummer character XML export to update "{name}". Existing items are kept, missing items are added, items no longer present are removed.

purge.confirm: Permanently delete {count} world compendium(s)? System compendia are kept. This cannot be undone.

importer.empty: No entries yet — select one or more XML files.
importer.hint: Upload one or more XML statblock files. Detected entries are listed below and imported into dedicated world compendia.
importer.skipDuplicates: Skip entries whose name already exists in the target compendium
importer.sourceBooksHint: Select which source books to include. This selection is saved for future imports.
importer.title: XML Data Importer

ammoTracking.hint: When enabled, weapons track and deduct ammunition on each attack. Empty weapons can only be reloaded. Burst fire bonuses are reduced proportionally when insufficient ammo is available.
ammoTracking.name: Ammo Tracking

applyDamageWorkflow.hint: When enabled, a dialog is shown before applying damage, allowing confirmation or adjustment. Disabling applies damage immediately.
applyDamageWorkflow.name: Damage: Confirmation Workflow

autoSustainEffect.hint: Automatically create a sustain active effect when a sustained spell is cast.
autoSustainEffect.name: Auto Sustain Effect

combatDefenseWorkflow.hint: When enabled, targeted tokens are automatically prompted to roll defense after an attack. Disabling this also disables the Soak Workflow.
combatDefenseWorkflow.name: Combat: Defense Workflow

combatSoakWorkflow.hint: When enabled, defenders are prompted to roll soak after defense. Requires Combat: Defense Workflow to be active.
combatSoakWorkflow.name: Combat: Soak Workflow

cybercombatWorkflow.hint: When enabled, Matrix attacks prompt targets for defense and resistance rolls. Disabling turns off the Cybercombat flow.
cybercombatWorkflow.name: Matrix: Cybercombat Workflow

decisionMode.hint: How reactive rolls (defense, soak, resist) are requested from the affected player. Dialog opens a prompt immediately; Chat Button posts a public card that opens the same dialog when the responsible player clicks it. Custom lets you decide per category below.
decisionMode.name: Reactive Decision Mode

decisionModeCombat.hint: Decision mode for reactive combat rolls (defense, soak) when the global mode is set to Custom.
decisionModeCombat.name: Decision Mode: Combat

decisionModeMagic.hint: Decision mode for reactive magic rolls (spell resist, spirit resist) when the global mode is set to Custom.
decisionModeMagic.name: Decision Mode: Magic

decisionModeMatrix.hint: Decision mode for reactive matrix rolls (matrix defense, resist, dumpshock) when the global mode is set to Custom.
decisionModeMatrix.name: Decision Mode: Matrix

defaultTokenVision.hint: Automatically enable vision on the prototype token when creating a new actor.
defaultTokenVision.name: Default Token Vision

defaultTokenVisionRange.hint: Default vision range (in grid units) for newly created actors. Set to 0 for unlimited range.
defaultTokenVisionRange.name: Default Token Vision Range

flowEdgeTimeout.hint: How long (in seconds) the Edge buttons stay active on a roll card during a combat or magic flow before they are automatically removed and the flow continues with the original result.
flowEdgeTimeout.name: Flow Edge Timeout

flowOpposedRollTimeout.hint: How long (in seconds) a combat or magic flow waits for the defender's opposed roll (resist, summoning) before it is rolled automatically with default options.
flowOpposedRollTimeout.name: Flow Opposed Roll Timeout

flowSettingsMenu.hint: All combat, magic, and matrix flow settings in one place: automatic workflows, reactive decisions, and timeouts.
flowSettingsMenu.label: Configure
flowSettingsMenu.name: Combat & Reaction Flows
flowSettingsMenu.playerNotice: World settings can only be changed by the gamemaster. You can still adjust your personal settings here.
flowSettingsMenu.title: Combat & Reaction Flows

gmDefenderPicker.hint: When no token is targeted before an attack, the GM can manually select the defender to trigger the defense flow.
gmDefenderPicker.name: Combat: GM Defender Picker
gmDefenderPicker.noValidActors: No valid actors found to select as defender.

liveInitiativeReduction.hint: Automatically adjust a combatant's Initiative Score mid-turn when their Initiative attribute or wound modifier changes.
liveInitiativeReduction.name: Live Initiative Changes

npcSkillsMenu.hint: Choose which skills are added to newly created NPCs.
npcSkillsMenu.label: Configure
npcSkillsMenu.name: NPC Default Skills
npcSkillsMenu.title: NPC Default Skills

riggerLookupMenu.hint: Configure which rigger skills and which command program drone tests use by default. Vehicles can override these individually on their Config tab.
riggerLookupMenu.label: Configure
riggerLookupMenu.name: Rigger Skill Mapping
riggerLookupMenu.title: Rigger Skill Mapping

sourceBooksMenu.hint: Bind a rulebook code (as it appears in item source fields, e.g. "SR4" or "AR") to a PDF page created via the PDF Pager module. Requires the optional PDF Pager module.
sourceBooksMenu.label: Configure
sourceBooksMenu.name: Source Books
sourceBooksMenu.title: Source Books

spellWorkflow.hint: Enable the multi-step spellcasting workflow (force selection, roll, drain).
spellWorkflow.name: Spell Workflow

spiritCompendium.hint: Compendium pack used to populate spirit type dropdowns on the Magic tab. Leave blank to use free-text input.
spiritCompendium.name: Spirit Compendium

spriteCompendium.hint: Compendium pack used to populate sprite type dropdowns on the Matrix tab. Leave blank to use free-text input.
spriteCompendium.name: Sprite Compendium

useDefaultEffectSheet.hint: When enabled, active effects open with Foundry's built-in sheet instead of the SR4 custom sheet.
useDefaultEffectSheet.name: Use Default Effect Sheet

xmlImporter.hint: Import items from external XML statblock files into world compendia.
xmlImporter.label: Open Importer
xmlImporter.name: XML Data Importer
